title: Expander Title Registry
description: Canonical titles for every recurring `st.expander(...)` block rendered by AIG-RLIC+ portal pages. Per APP-EX1 (owner: Ace, per META-CF), every recurring expander concept has exactly one canonical title — no 'Plain English' vs 'In plain English' vs 'ELI5' vs 'What this means' drift. Deviations require a `regression_note` entry (META-RNF + META-XVC). Closes the Wave-5 reproducibility-audit finding (Axis 1) that recurring expander titles varied across pages so readers could not pattern-match. The five bootstrap titles cover Plain English (N8 / RES-2), Deeper dive (technical detail), Why we chose this method (RES-EP1 element 3), How to read this chart (RES-EP1 element 3 reading guide), and Honest assessment (RES-EP1 element 7).

x-version.description: Semver of the registry instance (separate from this schema's x-version). Bumped per META-CF whenever a title is added, renamed, or its scope changes. Title RENAME is a breaking major bump (touches UI strings the stakeholder has learned to pattern-match).

x-owner.description: Single agent accountable for the registry instance. Must be 'ace'.

x-generated.description: ISO-8601 date the instance was last regenerated.

notes.description: Freeform top-level notes about the instance (added concepts, migration notes, deviation log).

titles.description: Map of concept_key (snake_case) -> title definition. concept_key is stable across versions; canonical_title is the user-visible string.

title_definition.description: One canonical expander title plus metadata describing when to use it.

canonical_title.description: Exact user-visible title string (including any emoji, properly spaced). Passed verbatim to st.expander(label=...).

role.description: Semantic role. Drives the when_to_use guidance and cross-ref to RES / APP rules.

when_to_use.description: One-sentence guidance on when a recurring concept should use this title. Disambiguates from the other canonical titles.

default_expanded.description: Default `expanded=` state on render (per APP-AF1: defer by default). Orientation expanders may be True; depth expanders are False.

sop_rule_ids.description: APP / RES rule IDs that use or reference this expander title.

deprecated_aliases.description: Former titles the canonical title replaced (for grep-based migration audits). Presence here documents that these strings MUST NOT appear in live portal code.
